titles.title: MeatPy: A Python Framework for Limit Order Book Reconstruction and Analysis

institution.institution_name: Department of Finance, HEC Montréal, Canada
Rotman School of Management and UTSC Management, University of Toronto, Canada

citation.article_title: An Object-Oriented Library for Real-Time Processing of NASDAQ Order Book Data
citation.author: Clark McGehee
citation.journal_title: Journal of Computer Engineering & Information Technology

citation.article_title: Inverted fee structures, tick size, and market quality
citation.author: Comerton-Forde

citation.article_title: Fast construction of nanosecond level snapshots of financial markets
citation.author: Gai
citation.journal_title: Proceedings of the Conference on Extreme Science and Engineering Discovery Environment: Gateway to Discovery

citation.article_title: How is earnings news transmitted to stock prices?
citation.author: Grégoire

citation.author: O’Hara
